calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 =302/ehg
